export.noPermission: Only the server owner or bot developer can export server configuration.

import.noPermission: Only the server owner can import server configuration.
import.botPermission: I need Manage Server, Manage Roles and Manage Channels permissions to import configuration.
import.botAdministratorWarning: Core does not have Administrator permission on this server. Some operations (Discord errors 50013 Missing Permissions, 50001 Missing Access) may fail or be skipped. [Add permission here]({adminUrl})

serverAiCreate.noPermission: Only the bot developer can create a server layout with AI.
serverAiCreate.botPermission: I need Manage Server, Manage Roles and Manage Channels permissions to create the layout.
serverAiCreate.success: Cohere generated and applied a server layout for **{guild}**.

system.errorDescription: Something went wrong while executing this interaction.
system.guildOnlyDescription: This command is only available on server `{guildId}`.

templates.noPermission: Only the server owner can use public templates.
templates.noTemplates: No public templates are available yet.
templates.notFound: Template `{name}` was not found. Use `/template list` to see available templates.
templates.botPermission: I need Manage Server, Manage Roles and Manage Channels permissions to apply templates.
templates.applyDescription: This will create or update roles, channels, permissions and server settings from this public template.
templates.applied: The public template was applied to this server.
templates.timeout: No server changes were made because the confirmation timed out.

add.noPermission: Only the bot developer can add public templates.
add.success: Public template **{name}** is now available through `/template preview` and `/template send`.
add.notFound: Template `{name}` was not found. Use autocomplete to choose an existing template.

delete.noPermission: Only the bot developer can delete public templates.
delete.success: Public template **{name}** was deleted from the bot.

levelUp.title: ## {username} reached level {level}!
levelUp.description: Congratulations, <@{userId}>! You have reached **level {level}** on the server.

welcomeDm.intro:
# Welcome to the Core server!

We are glad to see you on our Discord server.
Core is a server created to help people create, configure, and grow Discord servers, as well as to chat, relax, and spend time usefully.
welcomeDm.verification:
## Verification

To access the main server channels and start chatting, you need to complete verification in <#{verifyChannel}>.

To pass verification, follow the instruction:

> Click the text shown in the screenshot, then open the Verify website and authorize through Discord.

-# Important: never share your account data with other people and always check the authorization page carefully.
welcomeDm.development:
## Server development

The Core server is still in development, so we are open to suggestions and new ideas.

If you have an idea for making the server better, you can leave it in <#{suggestionsChannel}>.

**Have a pleasant time on the Core server.**

Complete verification, explore the channels, and feel comfortable in our community.

welcomePreview.noPermission: Only the bot developer can preview the welcome DM.
